items.title: Fiona Apple Says She’s Struggling To Write About The World’s “Endless Barrage Of Horrors”
items.summary: Fiona Apple hasn't been too absent recently. The elusive singer-songwriter co-wrote a track on Cara Delevingne's upcoming debut album, and she released a new song for the Anya Taylor-Joy miniseries Lucky.

items.title: John Summit’s Latest Twitter Beef Is With Pete Tong
items.summary: The DJs are fighting. Following recent beefs with Travis Scott and Diplo, John Summit called out Pete Tong earlier this week for allegedly stealing his unreleased remix of "Missing" by Everything But The Girl, but Tong retaliated with receipts today. The post John Summit’s Latest Twitter Beef Is With Pete Tong appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean’s “Rein Me In” Is The UK’s New Longest-Running #1 Single By British Artists
items.summary: Olivia Dean's ascent has been swift. Earlier this year, the pop star received her first Grammy nomination and ended up taking the trophy home, winning Best New Artist. Now, her hit "Rein Me In" with Sam Fender has broken a record, becoming the UK's longest-running #1 single by British artists.

items.title: Shinedown Bassist Eric Bass Steps Away From Band's Upcoming Tour
Snapped: Electric Forest Will Forever Be A Community of Love (A Photo Essay)
items.summary: Nestled in the forest of Michigan, music lovers from all walks of life congregate for a weekend of lasers, side quests, hammock naps, and sets from legendary DJs and bands. Electric Forest isn’t just a few days of stage hopping and dancing, it’s art installations big and small, a maze full of hidden rooms and […]
